messages.content: who was Jan Hammer

Jan Hammer is a Czech-American musician, composer, and record producer. He is best known for his work as a keyboardist and composer in the jazz fusion genre, particularly for his collaborations with guitarist John McLaughlin and his work on the television series Miami Vice. Hammer has won two Grammy Awards and is considered a pioneer in electronic music.

Tell me what is the current distance from Earth to Sun

The average distance from the Earth to the Sun is about 93 million miles (149.6 million kilometers). This distance is also known as an astronomical unit (AU), which is a unit of measurement used in astronomy to describe distances within the solar system. However, it's important to note that the distance between the Earth and the Sun can vary slightly throughout the year due to the elliptical shape of the Earth's orbit around the Sun.
